step_rationale: Protective anti-inflammatory and metabolic regulator; inverse association with diabetic atherosclerosis.
mechanism: BMP7 exerts cardioprotective effects through suppression of inflammatory pathways and improvement of metabolic dysfunction, reducing atherosclerotic burden.

references.title: Exploring Potential Drug Targets in Multiple Cardiovascular Diseases: A Study Based on Proteome-Wide Mendelian Randomization and Colocalization Analysis.
